summary: Entry point for shipyard-cp AI orchestration control plane. Defines architecture with LiteLLM as inference gateway, worker adapters for Codex/Claude Code/Antigravity, and OSS connectors. Documents setup, API endpoints, implementation status (Step 1-6 complete), and module structure.
risks: Worker execution environment not yet implemented
Mock servers require production service replacement
API key management currently environment variables only
tests: GitHub Projects v2 live tests verified
